caption: Three young women are seated at a long table against a plain grey wall in an indoor setting. The woman on the left wears a dark blue top and rests her chin on her hand with a thoughtful expression. The woman in the middle wears a dark blue top and looks forward. The woman on the right wears a dark blue top and a white surgical mask. All three women remain still across the sequence of frames. On the table in front of them are several notebooks and a white container. Superimposed white text across the center of the scene reads "UNIVERSITY OF MARYLAND Department of Surgery and R Adams Cowley Shock Trauma Center". In the bottom right corner, a small logo accompanied by the text "Sim Week" is visible. The scene remains static throughout the frames, with no significant movement or changes in the people's positions or expressions.
